name: ai-academy
description: AI Academy - Nền tảng giáo dục AI cá nhân hóa cho học sinh lớp 3-6

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ai-academy/types && npm run build -w @ai-academy/utils && npm run build -w @ai-academy/ai && npm run build -w @ai-academy/ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @ai-academy/api && npm run build -w @ai-academy/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
